name: SwiGLU + Warmdown Fix + Quarter Batch (1x5090)
blurb: Non-record 1xRTX5090 submission: systematic 10-experiment exploration discovering warmdown schedule bug, SwiGLU activation, quarter batch sizing, and gradient accumulation. Total improvement -0.035 bpb over stock baseline. Post-quant val_bpb 1.3281 under the 16MB artifact cap.
